name: aprende-comigo-plugins
description: Bespoke Claude Code plugins by Aprende Comigo for educational platform development

plugins.name: dev-workflow
plugins.description: Lightweight subagent-driven feature development and bug fixing workflow: implement, spec review, and quality review via sequential fresh subagents

plugins.name: neon
plugins.description: Neon Serverless Postgres integration with MCP tools, platform guidance skill, and a specialized Drizzle ORM + Neon database workflow agent for schema design, migrations, connections, and queries.

plugins.name: pr-review-toolkit
plugins.description: Comprehensive PR review agents specializing in comments, tests, error handling, type design, code quality, and code simplification

plugins.name: git
plugins.description: Git workflows, worktree management, and GitHub project board integration with MCP server, git-expert agent (Haiku), and project-manager agent (Sonnet)

plugins.name: better-auth
plugins.description: Better Auth integration skills covering core setup, sessions, security, hooks, plugins, and organization/multi-tenancy patterns

plugins.name: browser-control
plugins.description: Browser automation via Anthropic's playwright-cli: navigate pages, fill forms, take screenshots, mock network requests, manage sessions, and generate Playwright tests from the command line
